caption: A man wearing a black baseball cap and a black t-shirt with white lettering stands in front of a large printed list of baseball players and teams. The list includes entries such as "David Chang" for the "ARIZONA DIAMONDBACKS – MIAMI MARLINS" and "Kyle Harper" for the "ATLANTA BRAVES." At the top of the document, text reads "06.26.20" and "2020 Topps Clearly Authentic Baseball (MLB)." The man is positioned to the right of the list, partially obscuring some of the text. He remains stationary throughout the sequence, looking toward the camera with a neutral expression. A watermark that reads "CARDBREAKS.COM" appears in an orange and white logo on the right side of the scene. The setting remains constant across the frames, with no change in the man's posture, clothing, or the positioning of the background document.
